channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Asmah Majed rises in Tanzanian comedy through university roots and everyday humour
item.description: Asmah Majed, known on stage as Asmaah Jamida, has become one of the leading female comedians in Tanzania’s growing stand-up scene. Her journey started in 2019 while she was a university student servin...

item.title: Netflix to film adaptation of Carley Fortune’s ‘This Summer Will Be Different’ on Prince Edward Island
item.description: Netflix has announced plans to adapt Canadian author Carley Fortune’s latest romance novel, ‘This Summer Will Be Different,’ into a new television series set and filmed on Prince Edward Island. Fortun...

item.title: US Commission of Fine Arts Approves Commemorative Gold Coin with President Trump's Image for 250th Anniversary
item.description: A federal arts panel, all members appointed by President Donald Trump, unanimously approved a 24-carat gold commemorative coin bearing his image on Thursday. This coin forms part of the US Mint's seri...

item.title: ACT Opposes DepEd's Shift to Trimester School Calendar, Cites Lack of Consultation and Unresolved Education Issues
item.description: The Alliance of Concerned Teachers (ACT) has strongly criticised the government's approval of a new three-term school calendar for basic education, set to begin in School Year 2026-2027. ACT Chairpers...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Sharif and Azerbaijan President Ilham Aliyev Call for De-escalation in Gulf Region During Eid Call
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif held a telephone conversation with Azerbaijan’s President Ilham Aliyev on Friday to exchange Eidul Fitr greetings. During the call, both leaders discussed the ongoing hos...

item.title: Nova Scotia legislator targeted in blackmail attempt involving bitcoin ransom, police say
item.description: Police in Nova Scotia say a legislator was the target of a cyber extortion attempt in which a hacker demanded payment in bitcoin to prevent the release of compromising information. According to invest...

item.title: PMD forecasts rain and thunderstorms in Karachi and parts of Sindh on Eid ul Fitr, with possible showers in Lahore
item.description: According to the Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD), Karachi is expected to remain mostly dry over the next 24 hours with clear skies, sunshine during the day, and temperatures between 29 to 31 ...

item.title: James Slipper sets new Super Rugby appearance record with 203rd game
item.description: Australian rugby union veteran James Slipper has made history by becoming the most-capped player in Super Rugby, running out for his 203rd match and surpassing the previous record held by New Zealand’...

item.title: US military deploys reverse-engineered Iranian Shahed drone design in strikes against Iran
item.description: The article examines the US military's rapid development and combat use of the Low-Cost Uncrewed Combat Attack System (Lucas), a kamikaze drone modelled on Iran's Shahed series. In July 2025, Defence ...

item.title: West Virginia man arrested after allegedly shooting father with a crossbow and fleeing in snow
item.description: Authorities in West Virginia arrested Chase Fleming after he allegedly shot his father in the face with a crossbow during a domestic dispute. The bolt reportedly entered just below the victim's left e...

item.title: Meta launches Creator Fast Track programme with monthly pay for content creators
item.description: Meta, the parent company of Facebook, has introduced a new initiative called the Creator Fast Track programme aimed at attracting and supporting established content creators. The programme is targetin...

item.title: DepEd reports 241 senior high school graduates and ALS learners immediately hired during government job fairs in pilot areas
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd) announced that at least 241 senior high school (SHS) graduates and alternative learning system (ALS) learners were hired on the spot during the Bagong Pilipinas Ser...

item.title: Sowetan Assists Ekurhuleni Pensioner to Recover Old-Age Grant After Fraud
item.description: Sipho Mayo, a 68-year-old pensioner from Vosloorus, Ekurhuleni, endured a 14-month struggle after a stranger in Mamelodi fraudulently received his old-age grant of R2,400. Despite informing Sassa offi...

item.title: ED Council Approves Termination of Old ICC Approval for Unified Grand Central Station Project to Allow New Implementation Arrangements
item.description: The Economy and Development Council, chaired by President Ferdinand Marcos Jr., has approved the termination of the previous Investment Coordination Committee approval for the Unified Grand Central St...

item.title: University of Alabama Student James Gracey Dies in Barcelona During Spring Break
item.description: James “Jimmy” Gracey, a 20-year-old junior at the University of Alabama, was found dead in Barcelona, Spain, after going missing during a spring break night out. Gracey had traveled overseas to visit ...

item.title: Katie Holmes and Joshua Jackson: From Dawson’s Creek to Happy Hours reunion
item.description: Katie Holmes and Joshua Jackson first met back in 1997 during the filming of Dawson’s Creek, and their on-screen chemistry quickly translated into a brief real-life romance. They dated for a short per...

item.title: President Ruto Flags Off Construction of Naivasha–Malaba SGR Extension to Boost Regional Trade
item.description: President William Ruto has officially launched the construction of the Naivasha–Kisumu–Malaba Standard Gauge Railway (SGR) extension in Narok County, signalling a major step in expanding Kenya’s trans...

item.title: Wes Streeting criticises Conservative stance on Middle East during Question Time exchange
item.description: During a recent episode of the BBC’s Question Time, UK Health Secretary Wes Streeting drew laughter from the audience after making a pointed remark about the Conservative Party’s position on the Middl...

item.title: Harry Styles and Zoë Kravitz Spotted Together, Relationship Not Confirmed
item.description: Kenya, 2026 – The rumour mill is buzzing after singer Harry Styles and actress Zoë Kravitz were spotted together in multiple locations, sparking dating speculations. Fans first noticed the pair walkin...

item.title: Divergences emerge between Trump and Netanyahu over Israeli strike on Iranian gas field
item.description: A noticeable difference of opinion has surfaced between US President Donald Trump and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu regarding Israel's strike on Iran's South Pars gas field, the world's la...
